So the alternate reality is a good trick when what you're doing falls under any one of those things on the list we started with. It's a better approach most of the time, even though you dig a hole you have to climb out of, than is trying to describe the actual thing with any degree of accuracy, particularly at the lead generation stage, because it's too easy to instantly reject it.
